input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IC.4.2.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ic.4.2.1
            TITLE: an etc system that is commercially available, but does not comply with the regulations, may

            CONTENT:
            rule IC.4.2.1: An ETC system that is commercially available, but does not comply with the regulations, may
IC.4.2.1 An ETC system that is commercially available, but does not comply with the regulations, may 
be used, if approved prior to the event.

final_answer: An ETC system that is commercially available, but does not comply with the regulations, may be used, if approved prior to the event.
